title: Explore unified natural-language search (V2 enhancement)
description: Explore a unified search bar that handles mixed part+vehicle queries like 'mazas para chevrolet silverado 2015'. Would use PostgreSQL full-text search with combined tsvector across parts+vehicles data. Industry players (AutoZone, Oscaro, RockAuto) all use two-input (dropdowns + text) and fail at mixed queries. This would be a genuine innovation but complex. Research: Spanish tsvector config, combined materialized views, ranking across heterogeneous data. Deferred from V1 search implementation.

title: Create cart API routes
description: Create src/app/api/cart/route.ts with CRUD operations: GET (fetch current cart by user_id or session_id, items grouped by manufacturer), POST (add item — part_id + quantity, with stock availability check), PATCH (update quantity), DELETE (remove item). Use Supabase server client for user-scoped queries. Cart grouping by manufacturer_id is needed for the checkout shipping calculation later.

title: Create commerce database migration
description: Create supabase/migrations/YYYYMMDD_create_commerce_tables.sql with all commerce tables: parts (minimal for commerce — id, manufacturer_id, sku, name, price, quantity, weight_kg, dimensions_cm JSONB, images JSONB, status, category), orders (customer_id, status workflow, subtotal/shipping/fee/total, shipping_address JSONB, stripe_payment_intent_id), order_items (per-manufacturer line items with shipping/tracking fields, skydropx_shipment_id), manufacturer_stripe_accounts (stripe_account_id, onboarding flags), cart_items (user_id OR session_id, partial unique indexes). Add indexes on FKs, enable RLS, create updated_at triggers. Follow project conventions: BIGINT IDENTITY PKs, TEXT over VARCHAR, CHECK constraints for status enums.

title: Build manufacturer orders list page
description: Create/update src/app/[locale]/(dashboard)/orders/page.tsx. Shows order_items for the authenticated manufacturer, filtered by status (pending, confirmed, shipped, delivered). Each row shows: order ID, customer shipping address, items with quantities, amounts, current status. Sortable by date, filterable by status. Uses Supabase server client with manufacturer_id scope.

title: Epic: Shipping & Payments — Manufacturer Stripe Connect Onboarding
description: Manufacturers must have connected Stripe Express accounts before they can receive payouts from customer orders. This epic covers the full onboarding flow: creating Express connected accounts, handling Stripe's hosted onboarding redirect flow (return/refresh URLs), webhook processing for account status updates, and a manufacturer dashboard UI showing Stripe connection status. Depends on Epic 1 (Stripe client wrapper + DB tables). Plan: ~/.claude/plans/synchronous-wiggling-allen.md

title: Replace storefront placeholder images with real brand assets
Design faceted sidebar filters for search results
description: Design decision needed: should search results include a sidebar with faceted filters (category, brand, price range, condition) with result counts — like MercadoLibre/Amazon? Options discussed: (1) Sidebar with facet counts — shows filter options + how many results match each, best for discovery. (2) Sidebar without counts — same layout, simpler SQL (no aggregation). (3) No sidebar (current ACR approach). Requires UX mockup in .pen file, SQL aggregation design for facet counts, mobile responsive collapsible panel. This was deferred from the initial search implementation which follows ACR's simpler pattern.

Work is NOT done until PR is merged.

Refresh route: GET handler that generates a new Account Link if the previous one expired. Both routes redirect manufacturer back to their dashboard.

title: Push search sort to SQL for cross-page accuracy
description: V1 sorts in-memory per page (max 24-100 items). Price/name sorts are inaccurate across the full result set — a part ranked 30th by relevance never appears on page 1 even with price_asc selected. This is silently broken rather than explicitly disabled. Two fixes: (1) disable non-relevance sort when has_more is true, or (2) pass sort to SQL functions. Flagged in PR #42 claude-review.
notes: Related: RD-3un (faceted filters will also need SQL-level sort). Affects src/services/search/search.service.ts line 47.

POST handler that: (1) Creates Express connected account via stripe.accounts.create({ type: 'express', country: 'MX' }), (2) Saves account to manufacturer_stripe_accounts table, (3) Creates Account Link for Stripe's hosted onboarding UI, (4) Returns the Account Link URL. Must verify the requesting user is an authenticated manufacturer. Uses Stripe client wrapper from Task 1.2.

title: Epic: Shipping & Payments — Checkout & Payment
description: The core transaction flow: customer enters shipping address, sees per-manufacturer shipping rate quotes from Skydropx, pays via Stripe with automatic multi-manufacturer payment splits via Connect. On success, creates order + order_items, decrements inventory, clears cart, and emits Inngest event. This is the most complex epic — requires Epics 1-3 complete (DB, Stripe, Skydropx, cart). Plan: ~/.claude/plans/synchronous-wiggling-allen.md

title: Rename storefront.pen to design-system.pen

title: Server-side normalization: make/model/position/driveType
description: Implement server-side normalization maps for import pipeline. Per Data Architecture Spec v5.0 Section 2.6: make normalization (CHEVROLET/Chevrolet/CHEVY → Chevrolet, VW → Volkswagen), model normalization (trim, collapse whitespace), position normalization (DELANTERA → Front, 11 distinct values), driveType normalization (4X2/4x2 → 2WD, 10 distinct values), general normalization (trim, collapse whitespace, strip zero-width chars), UPC validation (8-14 digits), price validation (min 5 MXN), OE number normalization (uppercase, strip spaces/hyphens/dots). Vehicle alias resolution is separate (handled at search time, not import time).
close_reason: Implemented and tested

title: Add 'Add to Cart' button to product pages
description: Add 'Add to Cart' functionality to product detail page and product listing cards. Button with quantity selector (default 1), stock availability check before adding (disable if out of stock), success feedback (toast notification or cart count animation in header). Integrates with cart state management from Task 3.2.

title: Fix missing path boundary on /search regex in proxy.ts
description: The unauthenticated route pattern /^\/[a-z]{2}-[A-Z]{2}\/search/ in src/proxy.ts has no end anchor. Any future route starting with /search (e.g. /search-admin, /search-settings) would be silently granted unauthenticated access. Fix: change to /^\/[a-z]{2}-[A-Z]{2}\/search(\/|$)/. Flagged in PR #42 claude-review.
notes: Related: RD-owt (locale prefix investigation touches same proxy.ts file). Affects src/proxy.ts line 14.

title: VehicleSidebar: add focus trap for aria-modal accessibility
description: The sidebar declares role=dialog and aria-modal=true but has no focus trap. Keyboard users can Tab out into the page behind the backdrop. Add focus-trap-react or manual focus management: auto-focus search input on open, restore focus to trigger on close.

title: Implement Stripe payment flow with Connect splits
description: Create src/app/api/checkout/create-payment-intent/route.ts. Step 3 of checkout: calculates item totals + shipping per manufacturer + platform fee (9-10%). Creates Stripe PaymentIntent with application_fee_amount for platform and transfer_data for each manufacturer's Connected account. Frontend uses @stripe/react-stripe-js Elements for secure card input. Currency: MXN. Requires manufacturers to have completed Stripe Connect onboarding (Epic 2).

title: Build import pipeline: Excel parsing with template detection
description: Implement the Excel import pipeline per Data Architecture Spec v5.0 Section 2.3. Key components: (1) Template detection via hidden Metadata sheet, (2) Template Registry pattern for category-specific parsing, (3) Two-sheet parsing (Partes + Aplicaciones), (4) Three-layer validation (template-level, server-side normalization, partial success with error file). Use ExcelJS for parsing. Multi-make splitting (CHEVROLET, GMC → 2 fitment rows). OEM delimiter: semicolons. See ACR-Automotive src/services/excel/ for reference patterns (3-stage validate→preview→execute, DiffEngine, atomic PostgreSQL function).

title: Implement shipping label generation
description: Create src/app/api/dashboard/orders/[id]/label/route.ts. Manufacturer clicks 'Generate Label' on an order item. Calls Skydropx PRO: POST /v1/shipments (manufacturer origin + customer destination + package details), then POST /v1/labels to generate printable label PDF. Saves tracking_number, tracking_url, label_url, skydropx_shipment_id to order_items. Emits Inngest 'order/shipped' event. Uses Skydropx client from Task 1.3.

title: Refactor storefront molecules to use atom refs
description: 10 of 12 storefront molecules are built from raw primitives with no refs to shadcn atom components. They should use ref instances for Button, Input, Badge, etc. where applicable. This ensures base component updates cascade to all molecules automatically. Affected: Site Header, Promo Banner Bar, Category Nav Bar, Value Proposition Strip, Section Divider, Brand Logo Row, Footer, Product Card, Category List Card, Promo Carousel Card.

title: Create Skydropx PRO client wrapper
description: Create src/lib/skydropx/client.ts, src/lib/skydropx/types.ts, src/lib/skydropx/config.ts. HTTP client wrapping Skydropx PRO REST API (base URL: https://api.skydropx.com/v1/). Auth: OAuth2 with Client ID + Client Secret. Key methods: getQuotations() for rate quotes, createShipment(), createLabel(), getTracking(). Zod schemas for request/response validation. Legacy API deprecated Jan 2025 — must use PRO version. No existing Skydropx code in the project.

Use Stripe SDK's constructEvent() for signature verification.

title: Verify all checks pass
description: TypeScript typecheck, ESLint lint, production build (22 routes), Vitest tests. All green.
close_reason: Closed

title: Convert Zone B card cells to standalone atoms + retarget storefront refs
description: Convert all ~62 component card cells from ref nodes to standalone reusable frames (Zone B atoms) so storefront molecules can ref them directly. Retarget 7 storefront molecule refs to point to new Zone B atoms with remapped descendant IDs. This establishes the 4-zone reference hierarchy: Zone A (shadcn base) <- Zone B (branded atoms) <- Zone C (molecules) <- Zone D (screens). Plan: starry-cuddling-waterfall.md
close_reason: Zone B standalone atoms conversion complete: 59 card cells converted, 7 storefront refs retargeted, token sync, carousel fix, logo fix

title: Integration tests for ExportService (requires local Supabase)
description: ExportService.export() needs integration tests against a real Supabase instance. It fetches parts+fitments+oe_crossrefs and builds an .xlsx. Needs real data in parts/vehicles/fitments tables. Also verify round-trip: import a file, then export and confirm output matches. Files: src/services/import/export.service.ts

title: Adapt import pipeline to ML + Humberto conventions
description: Align pipeline column headers, dropdown values, attribute definitions, and photo handling with ML/Humberto conventions. Covers: new normalizers, header renames, 4 photo columns, Spanish dropdowns, OE semicolons, dataStartRow=3. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/lucky-wobbling-snowflake.md
close_reason: Adapted import pipeline to ML + Humberto conventions: renamed columns, all attributes free text for MVP, 4 named photo columns, OE multi-space separator, dataStartRow=3, removed speculative columns.

title: Epic: Shipping & Payments — Order Fulfillment
description: After payment, manufacturers fulfill orders: confirm items, generate Skydropx shipping labels, mark as shipped with tracking numbers. Inngest orchestrates the multi-step workflow (order confirmation, manufacturer notification, status tracking). Includes manufacturer dashboard pages for order management. Depends on Epic 4 (checkout creates orders). Plan: ~/.claude/plans/synchronous-wiggling-allen.md

title: Write RLS policies for 5 catalog tables
description: Add RLS policies to migration 004 for all 5 catalog tables. Enable RLS on each table. Public SELECT on vehicles, fitments, oe_crossrefs, vehicle_aliases. Parts: select_active (public sees active only), select_own (manufacturers see all their parts), update_own, admin_all. Reuse current_app_user_id() and is_admin() from migration 002. Document intentional omission of INSERT/DELETE policies (all writes via service role). See plan for full policy table.
close_reason: All implemented in 004_create_catalog_tables.sql

title: Bump Zone B Input/Select component font size to 16px for iOS zoom prevention
description: Form input and select trigger text in Zone B components is at 14px. Safari on iOS auto-zooms inputs below 16px, disrupting mobile UX. Bump font-size from 14px to 16px in the Input and Select branded atom components in Zone B (Component Cards frame aTiZl).
close_reason: Fixed: Input/Select font sizes bumped to 16px in both code and .pen design file

title: VehicleSidebar: stabilize onClose callback to prevent wasteful re-renders
description: onClose is passed as an inline arrow function from CategoryNav, causing the Escape key effect to tear down/re-add listener every render. Wrap onClose in useCallback in CategoryNav or use a ref pattern in the sidebar.

title: Seed vehicle_aliases with 15 initial aliases
description: Insert 15 vehicle aliases (from ACR reference data) into vehicle_aliases table using ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING for idempotency. Makes: chevy→CHEVROLET, beemer/bimmer→BMW, caddy→CADILLAC, ram/dodge→DODGE-RAM, vw→VOLKSWAGEN, merc/benz/mercedes→MERCEDES-BENZ. Models: stang→MUSTANG, vette→CORVETTE, slade→ESCALADE, cammy→CAMRY, monte→MONTE CARLO. All aliases stored lowercase, canonical names uppercase.
close_reason: All implemented in 004_create_catalog_tables.sql

title: Design System Consolidation: Shared Layout Primitives
description: Extract Container, Section, and ComingSoonPage components to src/components/shared/. Container replaces mx-auto max-w-7xl pattern duplicated in 9 files. Section wraps Container with heading/subtitle. ComingSoonPage replaces identical placeholder in 12 stub pages.
close_reason: Created Container, Section, ComingSoonPage in src/components/shared/. Replaced mx-auto max-w-7xl pattern in 9 catalog files. Updated 12 stub pages to use ComingSoonPage.

title: perf: remove unused Navigation module from promo carousel
description: promo-carousel.tsx imports Swiper Navigation module but sets navigation={false}. Custom buttons use swiperRef API directly. Remove the Navigation import and prop to reduce bundle size.

title: Create migration 005: import_jobs and import_errors tables
description: Create import tracking tables (import_jobs, import_errors) as a separate migration after catalog tables are in place. import_jobs tracks each catalog import (manufacturer_id, import_type, template_type, status, file_url, row counts, error_file_url, normalizations_applied JSONB). import_errors stores per-row errors (import_job_id, row_number, sheet_name, original_data JSONB, error_type, error_message, field_name). See Data Architecture Spec v5.0 Section 1.2 for schema. Depends on: catalog tables migration (004).
close_reason: Implemented and tested

title: Design System Consolidation: Adopt Unused shadcn Primitives
description: Replace hand-rolled markup with installed-but-unused shadcn components: Card in product cards, Input in search forms, Button in sign-out/close buttons, Tabs in vehicle sidebar. 7 of 10 installed primitives are currently unused.

title: Set up Stripe and Skydropx API accounts
description: Create test accounts for both payment and shipping providers before any commerce code work begins. Stripe: create account at stripe.com/mx, get test API keys (pk_test_*, sk_test_*, whsec_*). Skydropx PRO: create account at skydropx.com/pro, get Client ID + Client Secret (legacy API deprecated Jan 2025, must use PRO). Add all keys to .env.local and update .env.example with placeholders. This blocks Epic 1 tasks 1.2-1.4.
notes: Plan: docs/plans/shipping-payments-roadmap.md — Prerequisite: API account setup

title: Build customer order history page
description: Create src/app/[locale]/(storefront)/orders/page.tsx. Lists past orders for authenticated customer: order date, total, overall status, number of shipments. Click into order detail to see per-manufacturer shipment status and tracking links. Uses Supabase server client scoped to customer's user_id.

title: Verify Sentry error capture in dev and production
Fix empty category/part_type in ImportExecutor.insertParts
description: In import-executor.ts insertParts(), the category and part_type fields are set to empty strings: category: '' and part_type: ''. These should be populated from templateConfig.categorySlug and templateConfig.partType respectively. The data is available in ValidationResult.templateConfig but not passed through to the insert. File: src/services/import/import-executor.ts, lines around insertParts method.
close_reason: Fixed in this PR: category/part_type now populated from templateConfig.categorySlug and templateConfig.partType

title: Phase 3+4: Executor, Error Report, Template Gen, Export
description: import-executor.ts, error-report-generator.ts, template-generator.ts, export.service.ts + unit tests. Integration tests deferred until local Supabase available.
close_reason: import-executor, error-report-generator, template-generator, export.service created. 123 tests pass, tsc clean.

title: Investigate localePrefix: as-needed with authkit composition
Implement Skydropx delivery webhooks
description: Create src/app/api/webhooks/skydropx/route.ts. Verify HMAC SHA-512 signature from Skydropx. Handle delivery status update events: in_transit, out_for_delivery, delivered, exception. Update order_items status and tracking info. Trigger notification emails to customer on key status changes. Map Skydropx status codes to our order status enum.

title: Create order email templates
description: Create email templates using React Email + Resend (already in tech stack). Templates: (1) Order confirmation — sent to customer after payment, (2) New order notification — sent to each manufacturer with their items, (3) Order shipped — sent to customer with tracking number and carrier link, (4) Order delivered — sent to customer. All templates bilingual (es-MX primary, en-US secondary) matching next-intl locale. Render with react-email, send via Resend.

title: Implement cart state management
description: Create src/lib/cart/context.tsx (or server-side with cookies). Features: cart item count in header (storefront layout), optimistic updates for add/remove operations, guest cart using session_id cookie, merge guest cart into user cart on login (transfer session_id items to user_id). Consider React context vs server-side approach based on Next.js 16 patterns.

title: Build checkout success/failure pages
description: Create src/app/[locale]/(storefront)/checkout/success/page.tsx — order confirmation showing order number, items summary, shipping details, and expected delivery. Create src/app/[locale]/(storefront)/checkout/cancel/page.tsx — payment failed/cancelled page with option to retry or return to cart.

title: Verify migration: db reset + manual SQL checks
description: Run supabase db reset to verify all migrations (001-004) replay cleanly. Then run manual SQL checks: INSERT draft part with null price (should succeed), INSERT part with price < 35 (should fail CHECK), INSERT duplicate manufacturer_id+sku (should fail UNIQUE), INSERT duplicate vehicle with NULL engine (should fail COALESCE unique index), INSERT alias 'CHEVY' when 'chevy' exists (should fail case-insensitive unique), SELECT vehicle_aliases returns 15 rows, verify RLS (anon sees active parts but not drafts).
close_reason: All 9 SQL checks pass

title: Integrate Sentry
description: Add @sentry/nextjs, configure for client + server error tracking, test error capture.
close_reason: Sentry integrated with logging, replay, MCP

title: Design System Consolidation: Update pen-design-system Skill
description: Update pen-design-system skill so .pen-to-code translation always checks existing components first, composes from shadcn primitives, uses Container/Section for layout, uses useVehicleOptions for vehicle UI, never introduces arbitrary Tailwind values.
close_reason: Updated pen-design-system SKILL.md Step 3 with code-side component reuse rules: check shared/, ui/, hooks/, catalog/ before writing new JSX; never use arbitrary Tailwind values

title: Replace hardcoded emerald colors with design tokens
description: Claude review flagged bg-emerald-50, text-emerald-700, emerald-600 used across checkout components. Should define --color-success/--color-success-bg tokens in globals.css and use token-driven classes per CLAUDE.md. Affected files: payment-form.tsx, cart-item-card.tsx, added-to-cart-sidebar.tsx, shipping-form.tsx.

title: Product detail page: replace search card placeholder links
description: SearchProductCard currently links to /search?q=<sku> as a placeholder. When a product detail page (/parts/<id>) is implemented, update the Link href to point to the correct route.

title: Design component variant states (hover, focus, disabled)
close_reason: Added 12 reusable state variants (5 button disabled, 2 input focus/disabled, 2 select focus/disabled, 2 checkbox disabled, 1 tab disabled). Created Component States Reference documentation frame with visual grids for all 5 atom families. Fixed Checkbox/Unchecked naming.

title: Design System Consolidation: Eliminate Arbitrary Values
description: Replace 17 hardcoded arbitrary Tailwind values with design tokens. Extend @theme inline in globals.css where needed. Files: vehicle-sidebar, vehicle-banner, header-search, site-header, product-card, promo-banner, checkbox.

title: Implement Skydropx shipping rate quotes
description: Create src/app/api/checkout/shipping-quotes/route.ts. Step 2 of checkout: accepts shipping address + cart items grouped by manufacturer. For each manufacturer, calls Skydropx PRO POST /v1/quotations with origin (manufacturer address) + destination (customer address) + package dimensions/weight. Returns carrier options (DHL, FedEx, Estafeta, etc.) with prices per manufacturer. Customer selects carrier for each shipment. Uses Skydropx client from Task 1.3.

title: Build customer order tracking page
description: Create src/app/[locale]/(storefront)/orders/[id]/page.tsx. Shows full order detail for a single order: order summary (items, totals), per-manufacturer shipment cards each showing: carrier name, tracking number (clickable), status timeline (ordered -> confirmed -> shipped -> in transit -> delivered), estimated delivery date if available. Accessible only to the customer who placed the order.

title: Build checkout shipping address form
description: Update src/app/[locale]/(storefront)/checkout/page.tsx (currently stub). Step 1 of checkout: Mexico-specific address form with fields for street, exterior/interior number, colonia, codigo postal (CP), city (delegacion/municipio), state. Zod schema validation. Optional: save address for future orders. Address data flows to Step 2 (shipping quotes) as the destination.

title: CategoryNav: extract sidebar trigger as client island to reduce bundle
description: CategoryNav was converted from server to client component to hold sidebar state. This pulls VehicleSidebar and all its deps into the client bundle. Extract a small AddVehicleButton client component and keep the nav bar itself as a server component.

title: feat: add condition column to import pipeline
description: Import pipeline omits condition field, defaulting to DB value 'new'. When manufacturers need to import remanufactured or used parts, add condition back with Spanish-to-English value mapping (Nuevo→new, Usado→used, Remanufacturado→remanufactured). Affected files: constants.ts, validation-engine.ts, import-executor.ts, template-generator.ts, export.service.ts, error-report-generator.ts + tests.

title: Create order on payment success
description: Create src/app/api/checkout/confirm/route.ts (or handle via Stripe webhook). On successful payment: (1) Create orders row with totals and shipping address, (2) Create order_items rows — one per manufacturer per part with unit_price and shipping_cost, (3) Decrement parts.quantity for each item (inventory), (4) Clear cart_items for this user, (5) Emit Inngest 'order/created' event to trigger fulfillment workflow. All DB operations in a single transaction for atomicity.

title: Install agent skills
description: 13 global skills installed (Vercel, Supabase, WorkOS, Resend, Sentry, Vitest, Tailwind/shadcn, Inngest, next-intl, Accessibility, Web Design).
close_reason: Closed

title: Epic: Shipping & Payments — Notifications & Tracking
description: Customer-facing order visibility: email notifications at each order lifecycle stage, order history page, per-shipment tracking with status timeline. Also handles Skydropx delivery webhooks for automatic status updates. Depends on Epic 5 (order fulfillment creates the data to track). Plan: ~/.claude/plans/synchronous-wiggling-allen.md

title: fix: remove condition from import + fix vehicles upsert constraint
description: Two DB integration failures when importing Humberto's real mazas file: (1) parts.condition check constraint violated by Spanish values like 'Nuevo' — remove condition from pipeline, let DB default to 'new'. (2) vehicles upsert ON CONFLICT mismatch — expression index can't be targeted by PostgREST, need proper UNIQUE constraint. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/lucky-wobbling-snowflake.md
close_reason: Condition removed from pipeline, vehicles UNIQUE constraint fixed, round-trip export→import verified (380/380 parts)

Includes: 2-column layout (image gallery + product info), fitment badge, price/stock display, shipping options, quantity stepper, Add to Cart button, trust signals, tabbed specs/fitment/reviews section. Ref: designs/design-system.pen node SkLWX.

description: Implement the 2-step checkout from .pen designs. Shipping (node w32JP): 3-step progress bar, address form with input groups, delivery method radio cards, order summary sidebar. Payment (node idXrn): Stripe card form, billing address toggle, promo code, security badges. Ref: designs/design-system.pen.
close_reason: Implemented in feat/ecommerce-demo-screens

description: Implement post-purchase screens from .pen designs. Confirmation (node 38JYr): success hero, order number, delivery/summary cards, CTAs. Tracking (node XZZIV): vertical timeline stepper with 5 states, items list, support links. My Orders (node UWS7Q): order cards with status badges, filter tabs, action buttons. Ref: designs/design-system.pen.
close_reason: Implemented in feat/ecommerce-demo-screens

title: Search System V1 Phase 1: PostgreSQL + Service + API
description: Implement search infrastructure: pg_trgm extension, tsvector column, GIN indexes, 4 RPC functions (search_parts_by_text, search_parts_by_vehicle, search_parts_combined, get_vehicle_options), TypeScript service layer, and public API routes. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/shiny-snuggling-pebble.md
close_reason: Search V1 Phase 1 complete: migration 007 with pg_trgm/tsvector, 4 RPC functions, SearchService, 2 API routes, 22 unit tests

title: Import Pipeline Mode 1 — Add New Parts
description: Excel-based import pipeline for manufacturers to upload parts catalogs. 3-step wizard: Upload → Preview → Execute. Partial success with error file download. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/prancy-mapping-fern.md
close_reason: All 5 phases implemented: foundation, parse+validate, executor, output generation, API routes. 145 unit tests pass. Follow-up issues filed for integration tests and auth wiring.

title: Create Inngest order fulfillment workflow
description: Create src/inngest/functions/order-fulfillment.ts. Triggered by 'order/created' event. Steps: (1) Validate order + re-check stock, (2) Update order status to 'paid', (3) Send order confirmation email to customer via Resend, (4) For each manufacturer in order: create notification + update order_item status to 'confirmed', (5) Wait for shipping label creation, (6) On label created: update tracking info, notify customer. Register in src/inngest/functions/index.ts. Add 'order/created' and 'order/shipped' to Inngest client event schema.

title: Write migration 004: tables, indexes, constraints, triggers
description: Write supabase/migrations/004_create_catalog_tables.sql containing all 5 tables with their indexes, CHECK constraints, FK constraints, and the updated_at trigger on parts. Tables: vehicles (NULL-safe COALESCE unique index), parts (JSONB attributes, nullable price, draft default status), fitments (ON DELETE RESTRICT on vehicle_id), oe_crossrefs, vehicle_aliases (case-insensitive unique on LOWER(alias)). Follow patterns from migrations 001-003. See plan: docs/plans/core-catalog-tables-migration.md
close_reason: All implemented in 004_create_catalog_tables.sql

title: Create order tables migration (orders, order_items)
description: Create orders and order_items tables per Data Architecture Spec v5.0 Section 1.3. orders: customer_id FK to users, status (pending/paid/processing/shipped/delivered/cancelled/refunded), subtotal, shipping_total, platform_fee, total, currency, shipping_address JSONB, stripe_payment_intent_id. order_items: order_id, manufacturer_id, part_id, quantity, unit_price, subtotal, shipping_cost, tracking_number, tracking_url, status, skydropx_shipment_id, label_url. Deferred until checkout flow is built.

title: Implement Cart Page
description: Implement the Cart Page from the .pen design. Includes: cart item rows with vehicle fitment badges, quantity steppers, save for later/remove actions, order summary sidebar with promo code field, free shipping indicator, checkout CTA. Ref: designs/design-system.pen node SNMV3.
close_reason: Implemented in feat/ecommerce-demo-screens

title: Typography cleanup: fix undersized fonts + choose brand font family
description: Font sizes in the design system are too small for e-commerce best practices. Body text at 10-14px instead of 16px minimum. 7-8px text exists (accessibility violation). 4 non-standard sizes (7,8,11,13) don't map to Tailwind. No typography tokens defined. Also: no deliberate font family choice yet (Inter default in .pen, Geist Sans in code). Plan: explore 5 font candidates, remap all sizes to Tailwind standard scale, add typography tokens.
close_reason: Typography cleanup complete: switched to Outfit font, remapped 13 font sizes to 7 Tailwind-standard sizes, added typography tokens
